item.title: The eye of Sauron
item.description: The solar eclipse from Toronto
item.dc:creator: Popov007

item.title: 2024 Total Solar Eclipse from Mt. Vernon, Illinois.
item.description:
Here's a snippet towards the end of totality.
This is my favorite shot from the video I took (almost 5 minutes long). Check out those prominences!
This is my second solar eclipse, but it was my favorite one of the two. I knew a lot more about what functions were taking place and took more time to really appreciate it this time around. I think the best part about this was being able to share it with my son and his class back home in Minnesota. I was able to send his kindergarten teacher the pictures and videos in real time for them all to watch. I love seeing my son get so excited about all of this!
item.dc:creator: Mannerheim27

item.title: I think there's a metaphor here.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: My buddy drove 70 minutes south to get this shot
item.description: I drove 2.5 hrs north from 'close to' totality so my 7 yr old could experience the eclipse with her grandma. I figured my daughter can catch another totality later in life but she'll never get to see one with her grandma again. I saw the full eclipse 7 yrs ago when said daughter was a wee bairn in a pumpkin seat so I'm cool.
item.dc:creator: telemonianajax

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday random meme dump
item.description:
1. At least she was a good sport about it
2. Tom Cruise's cat
3. She is on point!
4. "Son, please help us film this shot of your mom"
5
6
7. 100% improves the scene!
8. Do you ever stop to think how weird English language can be?
9. That cat
10. When you're mad at your SO and they pinch your butt
11. Also playing with Paint for 3 hours because you have no games
12. Every time...
13. Do you ever wish you were a sword?
14. Working every night till midnight for your creative satisfaction. It's great, am I right? Right? :/ P.S. Hope this dump entertained you, if you liked the funnies, you might want to check out my "Stanley Parable" inspired game called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)". Wishlisting is the best way to support us small indie devs and our passion projects: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ THANK YOU!

item.title: A Meteorologist from the University of Reading shows just how long it takes water to soak into parched ground, illustrating why heavy rainfall after a drought can be dangerous and might lead to flash floods.
item.dc:creator: berkanee

item.title: There’s the fun side of YouTube, the weird side of YouTube, and the wrong side of YouTube…
item.description:
EDIT: This time on YouTube, I was watching “Say Yes to the Dress.” I don’t look for videos like these specifically, they just show up in my feed sometimes. . I was doing my YouTube thing, when I came across this atrocity. Clickbait is the worst. However, I feel like true crime clickbait is especially scummy, because it exploits real life tragedies in order to get clicks. Especially when it involves a real court sentence or death row. With so many YouTube channels out there about true crime, courtroom disasters, and death sentences, it can be hard to know what’s real until you’ve wasted 12 - 15 minutes of your life on a video that was nothing like the thumbnail. Also, because Texas is the most active death penalty state in the US, it gets featured a lot. I was born and raised in Texas, and had a strong interest in forensic psychology for the longest time. I can help you out! Here are some ways to spot a true crime clickbait title/thumbnail.
A LOT about capital punishment is going to be left out. Please don’t get mad about that! This post is not about the history of the death penalty. It’s not about whether you should be for it or against it. It’s just how to spot bullshit YouTube thumbnails.
If you haven’t already, I really suggest blocking this channel from your feed. There’s so much bullshit on their channel, I can smell it from my phone.
I oversimplified with this one. Technically, there is no law that says public executions are illegal, which means that someone theoretically could release footage of an execution. However, the courts have always blocked the media using a camera in the execution chamber, saying that the media has the right to witness the execution, but not to film it.
EDIT: I got some history wrong. The case that the Supreme Court heard, Furman v. Georgia, did not ban executions. Rather, it stated that current application of the death penalty, as used by the states, was unconstitutional. The Supreme Court did not reinstate it, either. Rather, state legislatures rewrote their laws to comply with the Furman ruling. Also: does anyone know what movie they took that electric chair image from?
See sources cited for the link.
This is the closest to “I want to fuck you!” That I’ve seen in the real last statements.
Anything that says “death penalty under age 18” is always bogus.
I cannot say death penalty states have NEVER executed children, because that’s simply not true. However, it’s not something that is currently done.
Fucking tragic and evil, but it has happened at least once.
I like how she goes from being a teenager sentenced to 100 years in jail to a daughter being sentenced to death. So absurd…
She sure wasn’t scared and crying like that when she pointed a gun at an eight year old child at her birthday party…
I’ve seen some reports that say this man is autistic, and other reports that refute that. I don’t know the full extend of the real story, except that he was never sentenced to life in prison, nor was he ever involved in a crime with a firearm.
I had to look at this image multiple times to make sure that I was seeing this correctly. I might even be wrong, but I REALLY think that’s supposed to be the judge’s bench in the background. Wrong way, buddy!
EDIT: CRUEL AND UNUSUAL PUNISHMENT. My brain broke. . Not only is this unrealistic, it’s so confusing. They’re trying to make this look like a dangerous child killer was sentenced to death, but I’m too distracted by this bizarre mask that I can’t make sense of.
Texas Death Row Basics: https://www.tdcj.texas.gov/death_row/dr_facts.html Filming Executions: https://storycorps.org/stories/execution-tapes/ Last Statements on Death Row: https://www.tdcj.texas.gov/death_row/dr_executed_offenders.html The story of George Stinney Jr: http://calendar.eji.org/racial-injustice/jun/16 The story of Kayla Norton: https://www.npr.org/sections/thetwo-way/2017/02/28/517688757/racist-assault-on-a-childs-birthday-party-yields-long-prison-terms-in-georgia About Jacob Morgan: https://apnews.com/article/fact-check-south-carolina-prison-15-years-527940664514

item.title: Backlogged memes (hard data)
item.description:
Hello all, I’m back on my bullshit Pineapple pizza is delightful if you use the right pineapple and I don’t care what anyone else says. Pineapple pepperoni is even better.
What a turn on
The Bible is a lot cooler than I remember
I do Not know what this is, I probably stole it from @Icouri
Apparently 90% of men are the north of England lol
Iconic. Headcanon that this dude just straight up guessed his name and it’s not Fergus at all
Dudes like this don’t even know anything about wolves. The alpha is usually female and there’s no beta. Omegaverse has ruined this country
They really have a sense for it
No idea what’s going on but I support it (this meme is from like October)
6 seems a little steep. Let’s make it 3 so it’s a real challenge
Idk it’s working out pret-Ty well for me Speaking of: https://tr.ee/XTefRiN_sF I’m very proud of it
Mine is png but what are you gonna do. (Photoshop has a quick export to png option and I use it liberally)
What is it with Vulcans and inter species banging. Like. Ok fine it’s space do whatever. But what’s wrong with lady Vulcans.
Sidebar, what is quark. It doesn’t translate and it seems like it’s basically just yogurt????? What’s the point?
No lol my love is unconditional
Based on science (tm) I have concluded that the dinosaurs invented gender reveals and that was their downfall. Society, take note.
Sisyphus memes give me existential crises
Oh please. Like a knife was even involved in that tomato eating fiasco. Would’ve been ten times cleaner if it had been (and if there was one he did not use it right. Also that is not historically accurate.)
The circle of life amirite
Is that guy looking at his penis? If so I think “heavy stuff” is a bit misleading if you know what I mean
Pockets are inextricably married to feminism as I found out in my pocket research for my 17th century fantasy. Which I am stuck on. Idk nothing anyone is doing feels natural and I feel like my brain is melting
BRB sending this to everyone ever
My toddler has played this game called “hat” since he was about 9 months old. He puts stuff on his head and then says “hat” in his tiny little matter of fact voice, and then giggles. It’s my favorite game ever
I am sure this is about pollution and such but I really like it…I read it as something about how much you’d sacrifice for the things that bring you joy… also no way a rose gives you enough oxygen to breathe. I think it would take like 6-7 trees?
Reborn doll, but a dragon. I kinda want one
Nothing wrong with easy mode. This is why I got annoyed with elden ring. You can’t just make the UI so stupid it hinders gameplay and then be all “my game is sooooo challenging git gud losers” yeah ok buddy tell that to literally every other bestselling game that has an easy mode so ppl can actually enjoy it. I will die on this hill.
Every sign has a story behind it, et cetera.
Love this game so much. I couldn’t get used to link in blue at first but now the green just doesn’t look right. Except for the twilight princess fit. Dayum.
Me over here with my hot chocolate: shame.
I think this is meant to be the fish that first walked on land and if so DONT U DO IT FISH I WILL KILL U
Behold, the exact reason I stopped caring what men think of my looks
My addition at the bottom
Crossbow? You’re so fucked man
Love it
Yep
I Like being assigned things. I like the look of betrayal when I sit there and watch myself not do them.
Take up space! Physically and emotionally!
This is actually genuinely terrifying
Fr though chipotle needs to go international because they do NOT have Monterey Jack cheese here so I can’t even make my own. The internet said to use Gouda???? Wtf
Well I can’t delete this so enjoy i guess, idk what it says
I’d give my kitty a million treats a day if he would never pee on the wall again. But it’s been awhile. Maybe he’s chill now?
Might as well just embrace it
Don’t threaten me with a good time
Yeah pretty much. Although not korok seeds. Fuck that shit I hate those koroks. More like moroks amirite
She’s just like whatever just let me sleep. And I respect that.
Stormy!
Welp that’s my time later skaters
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: Geostationary satellite view of today's eclipse
item.description: April 8 2024 total solar eclipse, as viewed by GOES-East satellite. Shows the shadow of the moon traversing the earth.

checkmate Atheists
